title: QIAGEN TopTaq PCR
description: QIAGEN TopTaq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL standard reaction with a pre-optimized 60 C anneal and a 94 C denaturation.

payload.notes: Vendor: QIAGEN, TopTaq DNA Polymerase (Cat. 200203). The 10X TopTaq PCR Buffer supplies 15 mM MgCl2 (1.5 mM at 1X). The 60 C annealing is QIAGEN's pre-optimized temperature suitable for most systems; if optimizing, start ~5 C below the lower primer Tm and run a 50-68 C gradient. Cycles 25-35. Extension 1 min/kb at 72 C. Primers 0.1-0.5 uM (0.2 uM typical). Template <= 1 ug. Optional 10X CoralLoad Concentrate (5 uL/50 uL) adds gel-loading dye. The handbook cycling table lists no hold (store products at 2-8 C). Source: QIAGEN TopTaq PCR Handbook 06/2010 (reaction Table 1 + cycling Table 2, read directly from the handbook PDF).
